name: onehand
description: 智能语音笔记桌面应用 - Intelligent Voice Notebook Desktop Application

scripts.build: npm run download-model && vue-tsc && vite build && electron-builder
scripts.build:dir: npm run download-model && vue-tsc && vite build && electron-builder --dir
scripts.electron:dev: npm run download-model && vue-tsc && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run download-model && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder
scripts.electron:build:win: npm run download-model && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --win
scripts.electron:build:mac: npm run download-model && vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json && electron-builder --mac
